items.title: The Spy Is Always in the Worst Possible Place
items.description: Twenty-five years after Robert Hanssen’s capture, espionage has found a new home.

items.title: Lessons from Excalibur
items.description: John Boorman’s restored masterpiece salvages the era of bad movies.

items.title: Mark Zuckerberg Faces the Tough Questions He Deserves
items.description: As Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg testifies in a landmark case, it’s time for Congress to stand up for children’s safety online.

items.title: The Greatest Sports Story Ever Told
items.description: Netflix has released a new documentary, Miracle: The Boys of ’80 .

items.title: The SAVE Act’s Virtuous Goals Are Not Worth the Cost
items.description: We shouldn’t further federalize elections, much less nuke the filibuster, to address a problem of marginal scale that states can address on their own.
